name: Dallas Gold and Gun
description_short: Dallas Gold and Gun LLC is a firearms dealer and pawn shop located in Dallas, TX. The business holds a Federal Firearms License but is currently expired as of April 1, 2024.
description_long:
Dallas Gold and Gun LLC operates as a licensed firearms dealer in Dallas, Texas, holding Federal Firearms License number 5-75-113-01-4D-19132. The business is classified as a Type 01 dealer in firearms (other than destructive devices) and includes gunsmith services. Located at 2461 N Stemmons Freeway in Dallas, the company is registered with the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives (ATF) and maintains both business and mailing addresses at the same location.

The company's primary service offering is firearms dealing and related transactions. As a licensed FFL dealer, they are authorized to buy, sell, and transfer firearms in compliance with federal regulations under 27 CFR 478.94. The business also provides gunsmith services as part of their Type 01 FFL classification, suggesting repair and maintenance capabilities for firearms.

The business is categorized as a pawn shop, indicating they likely accept collateral-based transactions in addition to their firearms dealing operations. This combination of firearms licensing and pawn services suggests a dual-purpose business model serving both enthusiasts seeking firearms and customers seeking collateral loans.

A critical concern is the FFL status: the Federal Firearms License expired on April 1, 2024. This means the company is no longer authorized to legally conduct firearms transactions. Potential customers should verify current licensing status before any firearms-related business, as the expired license renders the primary business function non-compliant with federal law.
address: 2461 N Stemmons Fwy 2nd Floor, Dallas, TX 75207

Operates under federal ATF oversight and regulation
cons: Federal Firearms License expired April 1, 2024 — no longer authorized to conduct firearms transactions

No website content provided describing specific services, pricing, or inventory

best_for: Customers seeking to verify historical FFL status or licensing records
Researchers studying expired firearms dealer licenses
Those needing contact information for closed or inactive business verification
diagnosis: This business is no longer operational for its primary function due to FFL expiration as of April 1, 2024. Any firearms transactions with this entity would be illegal. Consumers should not attempt firearms dealings with Dallas Gold and Gun LLC without independently verifying current valid licensing status directly with the ATF, and should treat this profile as a historical or reference record only.
